description: Create a configurable product named 'Oxford Dress Shirt' (SKU: 'SHIRT-OXFORD-001') in the 'Clothing' category with a price of $59.99. The product must utilize a new dropdown attribute 'Shirt Color' (attribute code: 'shirt_color') added to the 'Default' attribute set, with options for 'White', 'Blue', and 'Black' configured for product variations. Generate and enable three associated simple product variants—one for each color—with a quantity of 50 each. If login is required, use admin/Admin1234!.
